description: Static architecture evals for AGENTS, showrunner skill, and new-book runbook boundaries.

cases.stdout:
usage: novel-writer [-h]
                    {init-book,validate-book,list-evals,run-evals,list-trace-evals,run-trace-evals,build-context,accept-chapter,draft-acceptance-packet,prepare-chapter,pipeline-status,pipeline-quality-gate,pipeline-prose-quality-gate,author-direction-scaffold,reader-panel-review,style-bible-scaffold,style-bible-check,craft-contract-scaffold,craft-contract-check,concept-review,craft-card-check,style-calibration-scaffold,style-calibration-check,style-profile-list,style-bible-from-profile,pipeline-draft-acceptance,pipeline-accept,drift-report,pending-approvals,sync-pending-approvals,pending-approval-update,pending-approval-batch-update,migrate-v3,migrate-v3-1,outline-status,outline-map-review,outline-approval-packet,outline-approval-update,chapter-brief-gate,chapter-brief-scaffold,chapter-brief-check} ...

positional arguments:
  {init-book,validate-book,list-evals,run-evals,list-trace-evals,run-trace-evals,build-context,accept-chapter,draft-acceptance-packet,prepare-chapter,pipeline-status,pipeline-quality-gate,pipeline-prose-quality-gate,author-direction-scaffold,reader-panel-review,style-bible-scaffold,style-bible-check,craft-contract-scaffold,craft-contract-check,concept-review,craft-card-check,style-calibration-scaffold,style-calibration-check,style-profile-list,style-bible-from-profile,pipeline-draft-acceptance,pipeline-accept,drift-report,pending-approvals,sync-pending-approvals,pending-approval-update,pending-approval-batch-update,migrate-v3,migrate-v3-1,outline-status,outline-map-review,outline-approval-packet,outline-approval-update,chapter-brief-gate,chapter-brief-scaffold,chapter-brief-check}
    init-book           Create a new book project.
    validate-book       Validate a book project structure.
    list-evals          List available deterministic eval suites.
    run-evals           Run a deterministic eval suite.
    list-trace-evals    List available trace eval suites.
    run-trace-evals     Run a trace eval suite.
    build-context       Build a Markdown context pack for a chapter.
    accept-chapter      Apply an approved chapter acceptance update packet.
    draft-acceptance-packet
                        Draft a chapter acceptance packet for human review.
    prepare-chapter     Prepare a V2 chapter pipeline workspace.
    pipeline-status     Report V2 chapter pipeline artifact status.
    pipeline-quality-gate
                        Evaluate the V2.5 chapter quality gate.
    pipeline-prose-quality-gate
                        Evaluate the V4.1 prose quality gate.
    author-direction-scaffold
                        Write a lightweight human author direction scaffold.
    reader-panel-review
                        Write a non-canon simulated reader panel review
                        scaffold.
    style-bible-scaffold
                        Write a book-local Style Bible scaffold.
    style-bible-check   Check a book-local Style Bible contract.
    craft-contract-scaffold
                        Write a book-local craft contract scaffold.
    craft-contract-check
                        Check a book-local craft contract.
    concept-review      Generate a craft-card-driven concept review scaffold.
    craft-card-check    Check reusable craft cards for schema and quality.
    style-calibration-scaffold
                        Write a book-local style calibration scaffold.
    style-calibration-check
                        Check a book-local style calibration contract.
    style-profile-list  List reusable abstract style profiles.
    style-bible-from-profile
                        Write a book-local Style Bible from an abstract style
                        profile.
    pipeline-draft-acceptance
                        Draft an acceptance packet from the V2 pipeline
                        defaults.
    pipeline-accept     Apply a pipeline acceptance packet after explicit
                        human approval.
    drift-report        Generate a chapter-range drift review report.
    pending-approvals   List deduped pending approvals with source chapters.
    sync-pending-approvals
                        Write deduped pending approvals to
                        state/pending_approvals.yaml.
    pending-approval-update
                        Update one pending approval status in
                        state/pending_approvals.yaml.
    pending-approval-batch-update
                        Update multiple pending approval statuses in one
                        registry write.
    migrate-v3          Add missing lightweight V3 state files to an existing
                        book project.
    migrate-v3-1        Add missing V3.1 long-form outline architecture files
                        to a book project.
    outline-status      Report V3.1 outline approval status.
    outline-map-review  Generate a readable minimum-map review for V3.1
                        outlines.
    outline-approval-packet
                        Generate a human-readable outline approval packet.
    outline-approval-update
                        Update one V3.1 outline layer approval status.
    chapter-brief-gate  Check whether a chapter brief can proceed under V3.1
                        outline gates.
    chapter-brief-scaffold
                        Write a V3.3 chapter brief scaffold.
    chapter-brief-check
                        Check an existing chapter brief against the V3.3
                        contract.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
